answer: Only clear bags smaller than 30x30x15 cm, or small clutch bags under 12x12 cm, are allowed inside the venue. All bags are subject to security search at entry.
Re-entry is not permitted once you exit the stadium, except for medical emergencies coordinated with venue staff.
Immediately alert the nearest steward or volunteer. Every zone has a designated Family Reunification Point marked on the venue map, and announcements can be made over the PA system.
Multi-faith prayer and quiet rooms are located near Gate B (East Concourse) and Gate D (West Family Entrance).
Accessible seating and companion seating are available in Zones Z1, Z2, and Z4. Gates A, B, and D are wheelchair accessible with dedicated ramps and lifts.

Shuttle buses run every 10 minutes from the main transit hub. Rail service connects directly to the venue's East Concourse. Private vehicle parking is available at Lot 5, a 12-minute walk from Gate C.
Recycling and compost stations are located at every concourse level. Please separate recyclables, compostables, and landfill waste at the marked bins.
First-aid stations are located at every gate. For emergencies, alert the nearest steward, who can radio the on-site medical team directly.
